# PlayStation Blog Days of Play Announcement History: Timing Pattern Analysis (2022–2025)

## Summary

All data below was extracted directly from the PlayStation Blog (`blog.playstation.com`) by fetching the actual articles and extracting `<time>` HTML elements and in-article text. The URL path structure `/YYYY/MM/DD/slug/` encodes the publication date, and this was cross-validated against the embedded `datetime` attributes in each article's `<time class="entry-date published">` tag.

## Year-by-Year Data

### 2022
- **Blog Announcement Date:** May 24, 2022 (Tuesday), at 08:02 AM PDT
- **Article Title:** *"Days of Play 2022 sale starts May 25"*
- **Article URL:** `https://blog.playstation.com/2022/05/24/days-of-play-2022-sale-starts-may-25/`
- **Sale Start:** May 25, 2022 (Wednesday), at 00:00 AM local time
- **Sale End:** June 8, 2022 (Wednesday), at 11:59 PM local time
- **Sale Duration:** 15 days
- **Announcement-to-Sale Gap:** 1 day

### 2023
- **Blog Announcement Date:** May 29, 2023 (Monday), at 05:00 AM PDT
- **Article Title:** *"Days of Play 2023 sale kicks off on June 2"*
- **Article URL:** `https://blog.playstation.com/2023/05/29/days-of-play-2023-sale-kicks-off-on-june-2/`
- **Sale Start:** June 2, 2023 (Friday), at 12:01 AM local time
- **Sale End:** June 12, 2023 (Monday), at 11:59 PM local time
- **Sale Duration:** ~11 days
- **Announcement-to-Sale Gap:** 4 days

### 2024
- **Blog Announcement Date:** May 28, 2024 (Tuesday), at 05:00 AM PDT
- **Article Title:** *"Get ready: Days of Play celebration kicks off on May 29"*
- **Article URL:** `https://blog.playstation.com/2024/05/28/get-ready-days-of-play-celebration-kicks-off-on-may-29/`
- **Sale Start:** May 29, 2024 (Wednesday), at 12:01 AM local time
- **Sale End:** June 12, 2024 (Wednesday), at 11:59 PM local time
- **Sale Duration:** 15 days
- **Announcement-to-Sale Gap:** 1 day

### 2025
- **Blog Announcement Date:** May 27, 2025 (Tuesday), at 05:01–05:02 AM PDT (two companion articles published simultaneously)
- **Article Titles:**
  - *"Days of Play 2025 comes to PlayStation Store May 28"*
  - *"Celebrate Days of Play 2025 starting on May 28"*
- **Article URLs:**
  - `https://blog.playstation.com/2025/05/27/days-of-play-2025-comes-to-playstation-store-may-28/`
  - `https://blog.playstation.com/2025/05/27/celebrate-days-of-play-2025-starting-on-may-28/`
- **Sale Start:** May 28, 2025 (Wednesday), at 00:00 AM PDT/BST/JST
- **Sale End:** June 11, 2025 (Wednesday), at 23:59 PDT/BST/JST
- **Sale Duration:** 15 days
- **Announcement-to-Sale Gap:** 1 day

## Timing Pattern Analysis

### Blog Announcement Dates
| Year | Announcement Date | Day of Week | Time (PDT) |
|------|------------------|-------------|------------|
| 2021 (bonus) | May 25, 2021 | Tuesday | 5:00 PM |
| 2022 | May 24, 2022 | Tuesday | 8:02 AM |
| 2023 | May 29, 2023 | Monday | 5:00 AM |
| 2024 | May 28, 2024 | Tuesday | 5:00 AM |
| 2025 | May 27, 2025 | Tuesday | 5:01 AM |

**Key Patterns:**
- Announcements cluster in the **May 24–29 window** (a 6-day range across all four years)
- **Tuesday** is the strongly preferred day (3 out of 4 years: 2022, 2024, 2025). 2023 was an outlier on Monday.
- The standard publication time has settled on **~5:00 AM PDT** (2023, 2024, 2025).

### Sale Start Dates
| Year | Sale Start | Day of Week |
|------|-----------|-------------|
| 2022 | May 25 | Wednesday |
| 2023 | June 2 | Friday |
| 2024 | May 29 | Wednesday |
| 2025 | May 28 | Wednesday |

**Key Patterns:**
- 2023 was the outlier with a June start; every other year starts in May.
- **Wednesday** is the dominant sale-start day (2022, 2024, 2025).
- The sale start has trended earlier: May 25 → June 2 → May 29 → May 28.

### Sale End Dates
| Year | Sale End | Day of Week | Duration |
|------|---------|-------------|----------|
| 2022 | June 8 | Wednesday | 15 days |
| 2023 | June 12 | Monday | ~11 days |
| 2024 | June 12 | Wednesday | 15 days |
| 2025 | June 11 | Wednesday | 15 days |

**Key Patterns:**
- The end date clusters around **June 8–12** every year.
- **15 days** has become the standard duration (2022, 2024, 2025); 2023 was shorter at ~11 days.

### Announcement-to-Sale Lead Time
| Year | Gap (Days) |
|------|-----------|
| 2022 | 1 day |
| 2023 | 4 days |
| 2024 | 1 day |
| 2025 | 1 day |

- The dominant pattern is **1-day lead time** (announcement Tuesday → sale starts Wednesday). 2023 was the only year with a longer gap.

## Additional Context
- In 2025, Sony published **two companion articles simultaneously** — one focused on PlayStation Store deals and one on the broader celebration activities. This dual-article approach was not observed in prior years.
- The 2024 article explicitly referred to Days of Play as a "global tradition" that started "seven years ago" (i.e., ~2017).
- All articles were found via the PlayStation Blog's official `days-of-play` tag page.
